name: Dave Frishberg
abstract: David Lee Frishberg (March 23, 1933 – November 17, 2021) was an American jazz pianist, vocalist, composer, and lyricist. His songs have been performed by Blossom Dearie, Rosemary Clooney, Shirley Horn, Anita O'Day, Michael Feinstein, Irene Kral, Diana Krall, Rebecca Kilgore, Stacey Kent, Bette Midler, John Pizzarelli, Jessica Molaskey, B…

interviews.title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: The Stardust Road: A Hoagy Carmichael Jubilee

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Dave Frishberg is one of the best lyricists I’ve ever written with
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Metz Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: To have been able to record a record with what essentially was Soprano Summit. Davern, Wilber, Haggart on bass, Dave Frishberg on piano and Bucky, and me on drums. It was an Arbors record called “Reunion at Arbors.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Metz Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 3, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Rebecca Kilgore
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve been extremely lucky in my relationship with Dave Frishberg... he got me on the Arbors label... I just recorded another thing for Arbors with Dave Frishberg... he and I do a few duets
about_quotes.doc_title: Rebecca Kilgore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Keith Ingham
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] You have been, I should fill in our potential audience a little bit that we’re at a jazz festival and you’ve kind of been working double time because one of the piano players couldn’t get here. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah, Dave Frishberg.
about_quotes.doc_title: Keith Ingham interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: I had him in a small band with ... Dave Frishberg ... We worked in San Francisco around up there, and it was a real good little band. ... she later married Dave Frishberg ... You know Dave Frishberg?
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Roger Kellaway
about_quotes.evidence: Dave Bailey was looking for a pianist, Dave Frishberg was going with Allen Zoot and the position of piano with Clark Terry and Bob Brookmeyer was open and he got me that
about_quotes.doc_title: Roger Kellaway interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999
